description: You are an IT support technician diagnosing reports of sluggish browser performance in Microsoft Edge. Simulate a workload by opening these five websites in separate tabs: https://www.bbc.com, https://www.nytimes.com, https://github.com, https://www.wikipedia.org, and https://weather.gov. Identify the website tab consuming the most memory. Optimize the browser by enabling 'Startup boost' and 'Save resources with sleeping tabs' with a 5-minute inactivity timeout. Create a diagnostic report at /home/ga/Desktop/performance_report.txt that includes the Edge version string, the total number of tabs opened, the name and approximate memory usage of the highest-consuming website, confirmation of the enabled performance settings, and a brief recommendation for the user.
